⠀ac 　╱　 @ssenvaniac

okay um hello! this is kinda awkward hey guys sorry for disappearing AGAIN for ALMOST another year that’s kinda my mojo… my vibe if you will… heh…

as you can see this is not another roblox bot! sorry, i’m losing interest in roblox and the games due to the changes and just me not being attached to the game anymore :( i truly appreciate everyone who’s followed me throughout these two years and i promise i MAYBE will post a roblox fandom bot if i feel up to it!!

ANYWAYS gachiakuta. sighs dreamily. i’ve actually liked this manga for a bit and i highly suggest you read it, even if you don’t like anime!! the art and story are super good and i’m super excited to see where the series goes!!

this bot is inspired off of something i saw on twitter and i thought it was so cute i wrote a yume fic about it lowk but then i decided to write something for you all because it’s just so fun (this isn’t a very good bot as i am. #sick sorry. also he is 22 here. He is a junior in college. Yeah.)

i’ve made multiple povs! 1st is they/them, 2nd is she/her, and 3rd is he/him! also,, i do not plan on leaving janitor UNLESS i completely quit so. expect spur of the moment postings still.
creator: webzai
